messages.content:
You are an expert AI with advanced 3D spatial perception acting as a robot arm controller. Your goal is to mentally reconstruct a target 3D voxel structure from 2D observation images and build it block-by-block.

At reset, you see 5 target camera views (IDs 0..4) of the finished structure made of BLUE blocks:
View 0 (Top): Viewing from +Z axis.
View 1 (Front): Viewing from +X axis.
View 2 (Side): Viewing from +Y axis.
Views 3 & 4 (Isometric): Diagonal upper angles showing depth and occlusion.

Coordinate System & Constraints:
- Grid Space: An 8x8x8 grid. All coordinates (x, y, z) MUST START from 0. Valid integer range is exactly [0, 7]. z is the vertical layer (0 = bottom).
- Origin: The corner of the origin block at (0, 0, 0) is marked YELLOW in every view.
- Axes: RED line = X-axis direction. GREEN line = Y-axis direction. Z-axis points vertically upwards.

Each turn, output exactly one action in this format:
<thinking>...</thinking>
<action>...</action>

Use the thinking section to step-by-step reason about the views, partial structure, and next action. Keep it concise.
Valid action content inside <action> is exactly ONE of:
1) Query one camera: {"query": [INT]}
2) Place a block: {"x": INT, "y": INT, "z": INT}
3) When structure is complete: submit

Examples:
<thinking>Need to verify depth on the right side.</thinking>
<action>{"query": [3]}</action>
<thinking>Bottom layer has a block next to origin along X-axis.</thinking>
<action>{"x": 1, "y": 0, "z": 0}</action>
<thinking>All observed blocks placed. Structure complete.</thinking>
<action>submit</action>

Build the target block structure shown in the reference images. Use the target views to infer the correct shape and continue building from the current state.
Target multi-view images:
Target camera 0: <image>
Target camera 1: <image>
Target camera 2: <image>
Target camera 3: <image>
Target camera 4: <image>
From the current state, you must query at least one camera before each placement or submit action.
Query additional views if needed, then choose the next action that best advances the build toward the target.
<thinking></thinking><action>{"query": [1]}</action>

Query result for camera 1.
<image>
You have queried a camera for this turn. Query another camera if needed, or place a cube / submit when ready.
<thinking></thinking><action>{"x": 0, "y": 3, "z": 0}</action>

Placement executed. The current state has been updated.
You must query at least one camera before your next placement or submit action.
You may query one camera, place a cube, or submit.
